whyItMatters: Spotify Chief Architect, Niklas Gustavsson: "Once we implemented loops in our workflow, our agent success rate went from 20-30% to 80%." 26 minutes with Claude Code creator Boris Cherny on how Spotify runs AI agents across 20 million lines of code. Today 73% of their code is written by AI, most merged without a human ever seeing it. The model matters less t…
